title: OEM Account Manager
description: Manage and grow key OEM client accounts across the US and EU markets. Work with clients from initial enquiry through sampling, production, and delivery — acting as the primary point of contact.

title: Admin Officer
description: Handle day-to-day administrative operations including document management, office coordination, and internal communications. Support cross-departmental workflows and ensure smooth office operations.

title: EXIM Officer — Import
description: Manage import documentation, coordinate with freight forwarders, and ensure timely clearance of raw materials and components. Maintain compliance with Chinese customs regulations and company procurement schedules.

title: EXIM Officer — Custom Clearance
description: Handle export customs declarations, coordinate with brokers and logistics partners, and ensure all shipments meet regulatory requirements. Maintain accurate records for audit and compliance purposes.
